title: APEX Spec Lineage Tranche Movement
objective: Execute the bounded spec-lineage tranche from the completed APEX-root decomposition plan by moving the approved schema-reference and validation spec files into explicit database-lineage homes while preserving lineage-only treatment and avoiding archive routing, runtime, or active schema promotion.
dependency_note: Packet 001 defined the tranche boundaries and packet 001b established the PM/project/PSS database-lineage home. Packet 001e is the bounded follow-on for the standalone spec tree.
constrained_outputs: A bounded movement pass for the approved spec-lineage tree only
Imported spec lineage assets under docs/architecture/database-lineage/spec/ with explicit lineage-only labeling
An execution handoff documenting exact moved slices, preserved exclusions, and explicit lineage-only treatment
validation_steps: Confirm packet 001e moves only the approved spec tree and does not broaden into archive routing
Confirm the imported assets are labeled and placed as database-lineage reference only, not active schema authority
Confirm PM/project, automation, knowledge, and archive tranches remain untouched
Confirm no runtime code, migrations, or authority decisions are changed
sql_permission_note: Packet 001e authorizes only bounded physical movement of the approved spec-lineage tree into database-lineage homes. It does not authorize active schema promotion, archive routing, runtime changes, or SQL execution.
